docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,295.00 FILED BY JUNG, DANA AS TO DEFENDANT BUNSHOFT, ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNG, DANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNSHOFT, ADAM $1,295.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,360.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
